headysystems.title: HeadySystems™
headysystems.description: Enterprise-grade AI orchestration platform. 60+ patents. Sacred Geometry architecture. Continuous Semantic Logic.

features.title: Continuous Semantic Logic
features.desc: Replace boolean gates with geometric confidence scoring. Every decision is a vector operation in continuous space.

features.title: Sacred Geometry Math
features.desc: All system constants derive from φ (1.618). No magic numbers — spacing, timeouts, pool sizes, thresholds are all Fibonacci-scaled.

features.title: Bee Swarm Architecture
features.desc: 6,765 concurrent worker bees across 24 domains. Self-healing, auto-scaling, Fibonacci-stepped pool sizing.

features.title: 21-Stage Pipeline
features.desc: HCFullPipeline: from intake to receipt. Monte Carlo risk simulation, arena competition, metacognitive self-awareness.

features.title: Zero-Trust Security
features.desc: Post-quantum cryptography ready. mTLS everywhere. WebAuthn passwordless auth. Model output armor.

features.title: Edge-First Deployment
features.desc: Cloudflare Workers for sub-200ms inference. Cloud Run for heavy compute. Automatic failover across providers.

headyio.title: Heady I/O
headyio.description: Build with Heady. SDK, APIs, MCP tools, vector memory, and multi-model AI gateway. Ship faster with Sacred Geometry.

features.title: SDK & CLI
features.desc: npm install @heady-ai/sdk — TypeScript-first, tree-shakeable. Chat, memory, embeddings, battle-validate in one package.

features.title: MCP Protocol
features.desc: 31 tools over Streamable HTTP + SSE. Works with VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible IDE.

features.title: Vector Memory API
features.desc: 384-dimensional embeddings with 3D octree projection. Namespace isolation, pgvector backend, Cloudflare Vectorize edge.

features.title: Auth & Keys
features.desc: JWT + OAuth2 PKCE + API Keys. 25+ OAuth providers. Cross-domain session management built in.

features.title: Multi-Model Gateway
features.desc: Race 4+ providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Groq) simultaneously. Auto-failover. Best answer wins.

features.title: Observability
features.desc: OpenTelemetry traces, structured logging, correlation IDs, health matrices. Prometheus + Grafana ready.

headyapi.title: HeadyAPI™
headyapi.description: Unified AI gateway that races providers, caches responses, and auto-fails-over. One endpoint, every model.

features.title: Provider Racing
features.desc: Send your prompt to multiple models simultaneously. First quality response wins. Determinism-proven answers.

features.title: Semantic Cache
features.desc: Proven answers are cached and recalled by similarity. Cache hits are instant — zero model calls.

features.title: Auto-Failover
features.desc: If OpenAI is down, Gemini takes over. If Gemini is slow, Groq responds. Zero downtime, always.

features.title: BYOK Support
features.desc: Bring your own API keys for any provider. Use your existing contracts and billing.

features.title: Usage Analytics
features.desc: Per-model cost tracking, latency histograms, cache hit rates, and provider reliability scores.

features.title: Model Armor
features.desc: Output filtering, prompt injection detection, PII scrubbing, and compliance enforcement built in.

headymcp.title: HeadyMCP™
headymcp.description: Model Context Protocol hub. 31 tools, Streamable HTTP transport, Durable Objects for session state. Runs at Cloudflare edge.

features.title: 31 Production Tools
features.desc: Memory store/search, embeddings, chat, analyze, refactor, battle-validate, deploy, health — all via MCP protocol.

features.title: Edge-Native
features.desc: Runs on Cloudflare Workers. Your tools execute at the edge — no round-trip to origin. Sub-50ms tool calls.

features.title: Durable Sessions
features.desc: Cloudflare Durable Objects maintain MCP session state. WebSocket hibernation for efficient long-lived connections.

features.title: IDE Integration
features.desc: Works with VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, JetBrains, and any MCP-compatible client out of the box.

features.title: SSE Transport
features.desc: Server-Sent Events for streaming tool results. Real-time progress updates for long-running operations.

features.title: Zero-Trust Sandbox
features.desc: Every tool execution is sandboxed. RBAC per tool. Audit logging. Rate limiting. CSL confidence gates.

headyos.title: HeadyOS™
headyos.description: Not software. A living system. 6-layer kernel, cognitive archetypes, autonomous agents, and self-healing infrastructure.

features.title: 7 Cognitive Archetypes
features.desc: Owl (wisdom), Eagle (omniscience), Dolphin (creativity), Rabbit (multiplication), Ant (task), Elephant (memory), Beaver (build).

features.title: Self-Healing Loop
features.desc: Circuit breakers, exponential backoff, watchdogs, quarantine-and-respawn. The system heals itself.

features.title: Socratic Validation
features.desc: 4-check reasoning loop with 5 iteration max. Every decision is questioned before execution.

features.title: φ-Scaled Everything
features.desc: Timeouts, pool sizes, thresholds, heartbeats — all derived from golden ratio. Zero magic numbers.

features.title: Liquid Architecture
features.desc: Services flow like water. Deploy to edge, cloud, or local. Projection-based deployment — not copy-paste.

features.title: Auto-Success Engine
features.desc: φ⁷ heartbeat (29,034ms). 13 categories. Continuous improvement without human intervention.

headybuddy.title: HeadyBuddy™
headybuddy.description: Memory-aware AI assistant that knows you. Cross-device sync, long-term recall, anticipatory suggestions. Always learning.

features.title: Persistent Memory
features.desc: HeadyBuddy remembers your preferences, past conversations, project context, and goals. Cross-session continuity.

features.title: Cross-Device Sync
features.desc: Start on desktop, continue on phone. WebSocket event relay keeps all devices in perfect sync.

features.title: Anticipatory Help
features.desc: Predicts what you need before you ask. Proactive suggestions based on your patterns and history.

features.title: Custom Workspaces
features.desc: Create themed workspaces for different projects. Context-switch instantly between work, personal, and creative.

features.title: Privacy-First
features.desc: Your data stays yours. End-to-end encryption. Local-first storage with optional cloud sync.

features.title: Natural Conversation
features.desc: Not a chatbot — a companion. Understands context, tone, and intent. Responds with personality.

headycloud.title: HeadyCloud™
headycloud.description: Your AI, your cloud, your rules. Multi-region deployment, BYOK model access, and zero-trust compute.

features.title: Multi-Cloud Native
features.desc: Deploy to GCP, AWS, Cloudflare, or on-prem. Mix and match. No vendor lock-in ever.

features.title: Bring Your Own Keys
features.desc: Use your own API keys for any AI provider. Your contracts, your billing, your data.

features.title: Data Sovereignty
features.desc: Choose where your data lives. EU, US, APAC — compliance with GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2.

features.title: Cost Dashboard
features.desc: Real-time spending across all providers and services. Budget alerts. Usage forecasting.

features.title: Auto-Scaling
features.desc: Scale from zero to thousands of requests. Pay only for what you use. Fibonacci-stepped pool sizing.

features.title: Zero-Trust Compute
features.desc: mTLS between all services. PQC-ready encryption. IP classification and geo-guarding.

heady-ai.title: Heady AI™
heady-ai.description: The unified AI experience. Chat, create, code, research, and automate — powered by 20 competing AI nodes.

features.title: Battle Arena Mode
features.desc: Pit 20 AI nodes against each other. Best answer wins through competitive evaluation. Tournament-proven results.

features.title: Heady Chat
features.desc: Context-aware conversation with persistent memory. Switches models automatically for best response.

features.title: Heady Coder
features.desc: Multi-model code generation. Explain, refactor, battle-validate, and ship — all from natural language.

features.title: Heady Research
features.desc: Deep web research with citations via Perplexity Sonar Pro. Real-time intelligence with source verification.

features.title: Heady Creative
features.desc: MIDI composition, image generation, content creation — AI-powered creative tools for every medium.

features.title: Heady Automate
features.desc: Define workflows in natural language. HeadyBee swarm executes them autonomously with progress tracking.

headybot.title: HeadyBot™
headybot.description: Deploy intelligent agents that work around the clock. Task decomposition, swarm coordination, and self-improving execution.

features.title: Bee Swarm Engine
features.desc: Fibonacci-scaled worker pools. 24-domain autonomous bees. Auto-discovery, lifecycle management, health monitoring.

features.title: Task Decomposition
features.desc: Complex tasks are broken into DAG subtask graphs. Topological sort with cycle detection. Parallel execution.

features.title: Competitive Evaluation
features.desc: Multiple agents propose solutions. Arena mode scores and ranks. Best solution is selected automatically.

features.title: Continuous Learning
features.desc: Agents learn from every execution. Pattern recognition, mistake analysis, and optimization ops built in.

features.title: A2A Protocol
features.desc: Agent-to-agent communication protocol. Handoffs, shared context, dependency resolution across agent boundaries.

features.title: Swarm Dashboard
features.desc: Real-time visualization of all active bees, task progress, resource usage, and swarm health metrics.

headyconnection-org.title: HeadyConnection™
headyconnection-org.description: Bridging the AI divide. Open-source tools, community programs, and grants for underserved communities.

features.title: Community Programs
features.desc: Free AI literacy workshops, coding bootcamps, and mentorship programs for underserved communities.

features.title: Open Source
features.desc: Core Heady tools available under open-source licenses. Contribute, fork, and build on top of our work.

features.title: Education Grants
features.desc: Funding for schools, universities, and nonprofits to integrate AI into their curricula and operations.

features.title: Global Access
features.desc: Heady AI available in 40+ languages. Regional deployments for low-latency access worldwide.

features.title: Healthcare AI
features.desc: Free AI tools for healthcare workers in underserved areas. Medical research assistance and diagnostics support.

features.title: Sustainability
features.desc: Carbon-neutral compute. Green cloud partnerships. Environmental impact tracking for all AI operations.

headyfinance.title: HeadyFinance™
headyfinance.description: Quantitative analysis, risk modeling, portfolio optimization, and real-time market intelligence — powered by Sacred Geometry.

features.title: Portfolio Optimization
features.desc: φ-weighted asset allocation. Fibonacci retracement analysis. Golden ratio position sizing.

features.title: Risk Management
features.desc: Monte Carlo simulations with 1000+ scenarios. Real-time VaR calculations. Drawdown protection.

features.title: Signal Analysis
features.desc: Multi-timeframe trend detection. Sentiment analysis from news and social media. Pattern recognition.

features.title: Automated Trading
features.desc: Define strategies in natural language. Backtest against historical data. Paper trade before going live.

features.title: Smart Alerts
features.desc: Price targets, volume spikes, unusual options activity, macro events — all pushed to your devices in real-time.

features.title: Compliance
features.desc: Audit trails for every trade decision. Regulatory reporting. Tax-loss harvesting optimization.

headymusic.title: HeadyMusic™
headymusic.description: Cloud-native DAW sync, MIDI composition, and Sacred Geometry sound design. Create music with AI at the speed of thought.

features.title: AI Composition
features.desc: Generate melodies, harmonies, and chord progressions using Sacred Geometry intervals and φ-scaled rhythms.

features.title: DAW Integration
features.desc: Ableton Remote Script included. Real-time MIDI control from Heady to your DAW. Sub-millisecond sync.

features.title: Sound Design
features.desc: AI-generated sounds based on Fibonacci frequency ratios. Organic, breathing sound textures.

features.title: Collaboration
features.desc: Real-time multi-user sessions. Cross-device MIDI relay. Share projects and stems instantly.

features.title: Sample Packs
features.desc: Curated AI-generated sample packs. Royalty-free. Updated monthly with fresh sounds.

features.title: Vocal Processing
features.desc: AI vocal tuning, harmonization, and style transfer. Turn any voice into a production-ready track.

headystore.title: HeadyStore™
headystore.description: Discover and install AI tools, extensions, themes, bee templates, and integrations built by the Heady community.

features.title: Extensions
features.desc: VS Code, Chrome, Firefox, JetBrains, and CLI extensions. Install with one click.

features.title: Bee Templates
features.desc: Pre-built autonomous worker templates for every domain. Deploy in seconds, customize to your needs.

features.title: Themes
features.desc: Sacred Geometry themes for HeadyBuddy, HeadyIDE, and all Heady surfaces. Dark, light, neon.

features.title: Integrations
features.desc: Connect Heady to Slack, Discord, GitHub, Jira, Notion, Linear, and 50+ other tools.

features.title: Dashboards
features.desc: Pre-built monitoring dashboards for Grafana, Datadog, and the Heady observability kernel.

features.title: Site Templates
features.desc: Launch your website on Heady infrastructure. Premium templates with Sacred Geometry design built in.

headyex.title: HeadyExchange™
headyex.description: Buy, sell, and trade AI compute credits. Decentralized marketplace for GPU time, model access, and inference capacity.

features.title: Compute Credits
features.desc: HeadyCoin-denominated compute credits. Trade GPU hours, inference capacity, and storage allocation.

features.title: Market Dashboard
features.desc: Real-time pricing for compute across providers. Historical trends, volume, and arbitrage opportunities.

features.title: Instant Settlement
features.desc: Merkle-tree verified transactions. Instant settlement. No intermediaries. Full audit trail.

features.title: Staking
features.desc: Stake HeadyCoin to earn yield. Provide liquidity to the compute pool. Earn from every transaction.

features.title: Portfolio
features.desc: Track your compute holdings, usage, and returns. Rebalance across providers automatically.

features.title: Escrow Protection
features.desc: Smart contract escrow for all trades. Dispute resolution. Reputation scoring for sellers.

headyconnection-com.title: HeadyConnection™
headyconnection-com.description: The community hub for Heady builders. Forums, events, meetups, and networking for AI developers and entrepreneurs.

features.title: Community Forums
features.desc: Ask questions, share projects, and learn from other Heady builders. Expert community support.

features.title: Events & Meetups
features.desc: Weekly online events, monthly hackathons, and in-person meetups in major cities worldwide.

features.title: Challenges
features.desc: Monthly AI challenges with prizes. Build something amazing using Heady and get recognized.

features.title: Learning Paths
features.desc: Structured courses from beginner to expert. Video tutorials, hands-on labs, and certification.

features.title: Mentorship
features.desc: Get paired with experienced Heady developers. 1-on-1 guidance for your AI projects.

features.title: Job Board
features.desc: AI job opportunities from companies building with Heady. Post your resume, find your next role.

headyweb.title: HeadyWeb™
headyweb.description: Build and deploy websites with AI. Sacred Geometry design system, micro-frontend architecture, edge deployment.

features.title: AI Design System
features.desc: Sacred Geometry-based responsive design. φ-scaled spacing, golden ratio typography, organic animations.

features.title: Edge Deployment
features.desc: Sites deploy to Cloudflare edge network. Sub-100ms load times worldwide. Automatic SSL.

features.title: Micro-Frontends
features.desc: Module Federation architecture. Mix and match components from different frameworks.

features.title: AI Content
features.desc: Generate pages, copy, images, and layouts from natural language descriptions.

features.title: Responsive
features.desc: Every template is mobile-first. Responsive breakpoints at Fibonacci intervals.

features.title: SEO Built-In
features.desc: Auto-generated meta tags, structured data, sitemap, and semantic HTML. Score 95+ on Lighthouse.
